title: Legacy4Modpack
description: This modpack mimic the classic console experience to modern Java using the Legacy4J mod.
body:
# ![Legacy4Modpack logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba5296a620e1c12760ebf86d6d90dce264a1f672.png)⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀

This unofficial modpack is designed to bring back the nostalgia of the classic Minecraft Legacy Console Edition experience into modern Java Minecraft. It utilizes a clever mod called Legacy4J, which meticulously recreates the look, feel, and gameplay of the console edition. So, if you miss the old days of Minecraft on your console, this modpack is for you!

|Feature|Implemented|
|:-|:-:|
|[All the features of Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j#:~:text=%F0%9F%93%9D%20Planned%20and%20Implemented%20Features)|✅|
|Splitscreen Support|✅|
|Hides all things related to chat signing|✅|
|Include resource packs port from the Legacy Console⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀|✅|
|Performance boost|✅|
